ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone delicately sniffing or investigating a scent. The arms will move in a coordinated manner, drawing the hands up to the nose and then back down.  The movement will be subtle and deliberate, reflecting the careful nature of sniffing. The left arm will remain largely still, providing a visual anchor. I'll check existing examples for proper range of motion and smooth transitions. In frame 1, both arms are relaxed at the robot's sides. The left arm remains mostly still throughout. In frame 2, the right arm begins moving upward, the hand approaching the nose, with the wrist slightly tilted downward. In frame 3, the right hand is very near the nose, with a more pronounced downward tilt of the wrist, simulating a gentle sniff. In frame 4, the right hand starts to return to its original position, the wrist straightening out. In frame 5, both arms return to their neutral, relaxed positions.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, ready to smell
right arm begins to lift, hand reaching out
right hand nears the nose, a delicate sniff
the right hand pulls away, scent analyzed
both arms return to a relaxed state
